webSearch.apiKey.label: Grok Search API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: xAI API key for Grok web search (fallback: XAI_API_KEY env var).

webSearch.model.label: Grok Search Model
webSearch.model.help: Grok model override for web search.

webSearch.inlineCitations.label: Inline Citations
webSearch.inlineCitations.help: Include inline markdown citations in Grok responses.

codeExecution.enabled.label: Enable Code Execution
codeExecution.enabled.help: Enable the code_execution tool for remote xAI sandbox analysis.

codeExecution.maxTurns.label: Code Execution Max Turns
codeExecution.maxTurns.help: Optional max internal tool turns xAI may use for code_execution.

codeExecution.timeoutSeconds.label: Code Execution Timeout
codeExecution.timeoutSeconds.help: Timeout in seconds for code_execution requests.
